entities.woman: a woman in a yellow apron
entities.pot: a large silver pot with steam rising

scenes.title: The Kitchen
scenes.background_prompt: A warm kitchen interior with a gas stove, wooden countertops, a loaf of bread on a cutting board, a window showing rain outside, tiled backsplash. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A warm kitchen interior. A woman in a yellow apron over a white shirt stands near a gas stove, holding a wooden spoon in one hand. On the stove, a large silver pot sits on a burner with thick curls of steam rising from its surface, the lid resting beside it. On the wooden countertop to the right, a golden-brown loaf of bread sits on a wooden cutting board next to a bread knife. A window above the sink shows heavy rain falling outside, with gray clouds visible and raindrops streaking the glass. The kitchen has a tiled backsplash in pale blue, open shelves with jars and cups, and a checkered dish towel hanging from the oven handle. Warm yellow light fills the room.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman near the gas stove, standing and holding a wooden spoon. Place pot on the burner with thick curls of steam rising, lid resting beside it.
